assertionResults.reason: Blocked by missing web dashboard surface required by this assertion: `web-backend` and `web-frontend` remain `pending` in milestone `web-ui`, `snipsnap.web.app` is not importable, and localhost:3200 is not serving the dashboard/health endpoint.

Blocked on the same unmet web dependency: the assertion requires opening the web transcription browser after CLI transcription, but the dashboard cannot be launched/reached in this milestone context (missing `snipsnap.web.app`, no service on port 3200).

frictions.description: `agent-browser errors` returned a very large stream of repeated `DexieError` entries that appeared unrelated to this localhost flow attempt, making console diagnostics noisy.
frictions.resolution: Used direct connection/startup evidence (`curl`, import check, uvicorn import failure, and agent-browser open failure) as deterministic blockers instead.

blockers.description: Required web dashboard user surface is unavailable in this milestone context: web-ui feature set is pending and ASGI app module `snipsnap.web.app` is missing, so browser-based validation cannot be executed.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Attempted localhost health check, direct browser open, and uvicorn startup using project venv; all failed due unreachable service/missing module.
